title: add pre-commit to coverself-helmsman and fix linting errors

diffs.diff:
@@ -6,8 +6,8 @@ export AWS_RETRY_MODE=adaptive
 export AWS_MAX_ATTEMPTS=10
 
 function update_kubeconfig {
-  aws eks update-kubeconfig --name ${LABEL} --kubeconfig /tmp/${LABEL}.kubeconfig
-  chmod go-r /tmp/${LABEL}.kubeconfig
+  aws eks update-kubeconfig --name "${LABEL}" --kubeconfig /tmp/"${LABEL}".kubeconfig
+  chmod go-r /tmp/"${LABEL}".kubeconfig
 }
 
 airflow_deployment=${AIRFLOW_DEPLOYMENT:=0}
@@ -16,21 +16,30 @@ desired_state_file_name="desired-state.yaml"
 update_kubeconfig
 
 export KUBECONFIG=/tmp/${LABEL}.kubeconfig
-export ACCOUNT_ID=$(aws sts get-caller-identity --query "Account" --output text)
+ACCOUNT_ID=$(aws sts get-caller-identity --query "Account" --output text)
+export ACCOUNT_ID
 
 # Infrastructure SSM parameters (published by ng-infrastructure Terraform layers)
-export CS_POSTGRES_ENDPOINT=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /${LABEL}/infrastructure/storage/coverself/db_endpoint --output text --query Parameter.Value 2>/dev/null || echo "dummy")
-export CS_EFS_ID=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /${LABEL}/infrastructure/storage/coverself/efs_id --output text --query Parameter.Value 2>/dev/null || echo "dummy")
-export CS_EFS_AP_ID=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /${LABEL}/infrastructure/storage/coverself/efs_cortex_prepay_worker_ap_id --output text --query Parameter.Value 2>/dev/null || echo "dummy")
+CS_POSTGRES_ENDPOINT=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /"${LABEL}"/infrastructure/storage/coverself/db_endpoint --output text --query Parameter.Value 2>/dev/null || echo "dummy")
+export CS_POSTGRES_ENDPOINT
+CS_EFS_ID=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /"${LABEL}"/infrastructure/storage/coverself/efs_id --output text --query Parameter.Value 2>/dev/null || echo "dummy")
+export CS_EFS_ID
+CS_EFS_AP_ID=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /"${LABEL}"/infrastructure/storage/coverself/efs_cortex_prepay_worker_ap_id --output text --query Parameter.Value 2>/dev/null || echo "dummy")
+export CS_EFS_AP_ID
 
 # Config SSM parameters (set via luna-config-spec / seiji config)
-export CS_KEYCLOAK_DNS=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /${LABEL}/config/nextgen.coverself.deploy/keycloak_dns --output text --query Parameter.Value 2>/dev/null || echo "dummy")
-export CS_API_DNS=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /${LABEL}/config/nextgen.coverself.deploy/api_dns --output text --query Parameter.Value 2>/dev/null || echo "dummy")
-export CS_CREOL_UI_DNS=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /${LABEL}/config/nextgen.coverself.deploy/creol_ui_dns --output text --query Parameter.Value 2>/dev/null || echo "dummy")
-export CS_API_NAMESPACE=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /${LABEL}/config/nextgen.coverself.deploy/api_namespace --output text --query Parameter.Value 2>/dev/null || echo "cs-apps")
-export CS_COMMONS_NAMESPACE=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /${LABEL}/config/nextgen.coverself.deploy/commons_namespace --output text --query Parameter.Value 2>/dev/null || echo "commons")
-
-if [[ $airflow_deployment == "1" ]]; then
+CS_KEYCLOAK_DNS=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /"${LABEL}"/config/nextgen.coverself.deploy/keycloak_dns --output text --query Parameter.Value 2>/dev/null || echo "dummy")
+export CS_KEYCLOAK_DNS
+CS_API_DNS=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /"${LABEL}"/config/nextgen.coverself.deploy/api_dns --output text --query Parameter.Value 2>/dev/null || echo "dummy")
+export CS_API_DNS
+CS_CREOL_UI_DNS=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /"${LABEL}"/config/nextgen.coverself.deploy/creol_ui_dns --output text --query Parameter.Value 2>/dev/null || echo "dummy")
+export CS_CREOL_UI_DNS
+CS_API_NAMESPACE=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /"${LABEL}"/config/nextgen.coverself.deploy/api_namespace --output text --query Parameter.Value 2>/dev/null || echo "cs-apps")
+export CS_API_NAMESPACE
+CS_COMMONS_NAMESPACE=$(aws ssm get-parameter --name /"${LABEL}"/config/nextgen.coverself.deploy/commons_namespace --output text --query Parameter.Value 2>/dev/null || echo "commons")
+export CS_COMMONS_NAMESPACE
+
+if [[ ${airflow_deployment} == "1" ]]; then
     no_update="-no-update"
     helm repo update
 fi
@@ -44,4 +53,4 @@ helmsman -apply -f ${desired_state_file_name} \
     --verbose                                  \
     --p 5                                      \
     --migrate-context                          \
-    ${no_update:-}
+    "${no_update:-}"

@@ -7,10 +7,14 @@ function var_exists() {
 
 function semverParseInto() {
     local RE='[^0-9]*\([0-9]*\)[.]\([0-9]*\)[.]\([0-9]*\)\([0-9A-Za-z-]*\)'
-    eval $2=`echo $1 | sed -e "s#$RE#\1#"`
-    eval $3=`echo $1 | sed -e "s#$RE#\2#"`
-    eval $4=`echo $1 | sed -e "s#$RE#\3#"`
-    eval $5=`echo $1 | sed -e "s#$RE#\4#"`
+    # shellcheck disable=SC2001
+    eval "$2=$(echo "$1" | sed -e "s#$RE#\1#")"
+    # shellcheck disable=SC2001
+    eval "$3=$(echo "$1" | sed -e "s#$RE#\2#")"
+    # shellcheck disable=SC2001
+    eval "$4=$(echo "$1" | sed -e "s#$RE#\3#")"
+    # shellcheck disable=SC2001
+    eval "$5=$(echo "$1" | sed -e "s#$RE#\4#")"
 }
 
 function is_integer() {
@@ -23,11 +27,12 @@ function is_integer() {
 
 function is_pre_spack_deploy_utils {
   deploy_utils_version=$1
+  # shellcheck disable=SC2034
   local MAJOR MINOR PATCH SPECIAL
 
-  semverParseInto ${deploy_utils_version} MAJOR MINOR PATCH SPECIAL
+  semverParseInto "${deploy_utils_version}" MAJOR MINOR PATCH SPECIAL
 
-  if [[ $(is_integer $MAJOR) != "true" ]] || [[ $(is_integer $MINOR) != "true" ]]; then
+  if [[ $(is_integer "$MAJOR") != "true" ]] || [[ $(is_integer "$MINOR") != "true" ]]; then
     echo "false"
   elif [[ ${MAJOR} -eq 0 ]] && [[ ${MINOR} -eq 0 ]]; then
     echo "false"
@@ -47,18 +52,19 @@ function get_seiji_pkg_luna_deploy_utils {
     if [[ -f "${luna_deploy_file}" ]] && [[ "${deploy_utils_version}" != "latest" ]]; then
         echo "[INFO] ${luna_deploy_file} already exists"
     else
-        echo "[INFO] Getting seiji-pkg seiji.common.bash version $deploy_utils_version at ${seiji_tmp_deploy_utils_dir}"
-        seiji-pkg pull --coordinate seiji.common.bash --pkg-version ${deploy_utils_version} --allow-snapshots --output-path /tmp
+        echo "[INFO] Getting seiji-pkg seiji.common.bash version ${deploy_utils_version} at ${seiji_tmp_deploy_utils_dir}"
+        seiji-pkg pull --coordinate seiji.common.bash --pkg-version "${deploy_utils_version}" --allow-snapshots --output-path /tmp
     fi
-    mkdir -p $seiji_tmp_deploy_utils_dir
-    pushd $seiji_tmp_deploy_utils_dir
-    unzip -o ${luna_deploy_file}
-    popd
+    mkdir -p "$seiji_tmp_deploy_utils_dir"
+    pushd "$seiji_tmp_deploy_utils_dir" || exit
+    unzip -o "${luna_deploy_file}"
+    popd || exit
 }
 
 function get_luna_deploy_utils_dir {
     declare -r base_deploy_utils_dir="/tmp/luna-deploy-utils"
     local utils_layer
+    # shellcheck disable=SC2153
     if var_exists DEPLOY_UTILS_VERSION && [[ "${DEPLOY_UTILS_VERSION}" == "local" ]]; then
       utils_layer="/"
     else
@@ -68,30 +74,31 @@ function get_luna_deploy_utils_dir {
     echo "${base_deploy_utils_dir}${utils_layer}"
 }
 
-declare -r tmp_deploy_utils_dir="$(get_luna_deploy_utils_dir)"
+tmp_deploy_utils_dir="$(get_luna_deploy_utils_dir)"
+declare -r tmp_deploy_utils_dir
 
 if var_exists DEPLOY_UTILS_VERSION; then
-  echo "[INFO] Received DEPLOY_UTILS_VERSION override, using version $DEPLOY_UTILS_VERSION"
-  branch=$DEPLOY_UTILS_VERSION
+  echo "[INFO] Received DEPLOY_UTILS_VERSION override, using version ${DEPLOY_UTILS_VERSION}"
+  branch=${DEPLOY_UTILS_VERSION}
 else
   branch="latest"
   echo "[INFO] DEPLOY_UTILS_VERSION not set, defaulting to ${branch}"
 fi
 
-if [[ "$branch" == "local" ]]; then
-  if [[ -d "$tmp_deploy_utils_dir" ]]; then
+if [[ "${branch}" == "local" ]]; then
+  if [[ -d "${tmp_deploy_utils_dir}" ]]; then
     echo "[INFO] DEPLOY_UTILS_VERSION set to \"local\", not re-installing luna-deploy-utils"
   else
-    echo "[ERROR] DEPLOY_UTILS_VERSION set to \"local\" but $tmp_deploy_utils_dir does not exist"
+    echo "[ERROR] DEPLOY_UTILS_VERSION set to \"local\" but ${tmp_deploy_utils_dir} does not exist"
     exit 1
   fi
 else
-  if [[ -d "$tmp_deploy_utils_dir" ]]; then
-    rm -rf "$tmp_deploy_utils_dir"
+  if [[ -d "${tmp_deploy_utils_dir}" ]]; then
+    rm -rf "${tmp_deploy_utils_dir}"
   fi
   if [[ $(is_pre_spack_deploy_utils "${branch}") == "true" ]]; then
-    echo "[INFO] Cloning luna-deploy-utils version $branch at ${tmp_deploy_utils_dir}"
-    git clone --single-branch --branch "$branch" git@gitlab.com:abacusinsights/lunatic-dove/luna-deploy-utils.git "$tmp_deploy_utils_dir"
+    echo "[INFO] Cloning luna-deploy-utils version ${branch} at ${tmp_deploy_utils_dir}"
+    git clone --single-branch --branch "${branch}" git@gitlab.com:abacusinsights/lunatic-dove/luna-deploy-utils.git "${tmp_deploy_utils_dir}"
   else
     get_seiji_pkg_luna_deploy_utils "${branch}" "${tmp_deploy_utils_dir}"
   fi

@@ -3,17 +3,20 @@
 set -euE -o pipefail
 
 deploy_directory="$( cd "$( dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" )" >/dev/null 2>&1 && pwd )"
-venv_name="coverself"
+export venv_name="coverself"
 
-source ${deploy_directory}/deploy-utils.sh
+# shellcheck disable=SC1091
+source "${deploy_directory}/deploy-utils.sh"
 
-source $tmp_deploy_utils_dir/user-scripts/deploy-commons.sh
+# shellcheck disable=SC1091,SC2154
+source "${tmp_deploy_utils_dir}/user-scripts/deploy-commons.sh"
 deploy_init "$@"
 update_kubeconfig
-cd $deploy_directory/..
+cd "${deploy_directory}/.."
 
 export KUBECONFIG=/tmp/${LABEL}.kubeconfig
-export ACCOUNT_ID=$(aws sts get-caller-identity --query "Account" --output text)
+ACCOUNT_ID=$(aws sts get-caller-identity --query "Account" --output text)
+export ACCOUNT_ID
 
 # Set dummy values for env-var-substituted references in values files
 export CS_POSTGRES_ENDPOINT="dummy"

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+---
+exclude: ^local-charts/
+repos:
+  - repo: https://github.com/pre-commit/pre-commit-hooks
+    rev: v6.0.0
+    hooks:
+      - id: trailing-whitespace
+      - id: end-of-file-fixer
+      - id: no-commit-to-branch
+        args: [--branch, qa, --branch, master, --branch, main]
+  - repo: https://github.com/adrienverge/yamllint.git
+    rev: v1.38.0
+    hooks:
+      - id: yamllint
+  - repo: https://github.com/koalaman/shellcheck-precommit
+    rev: v0.11.0
+    hooks:
+      - id: shellcheck

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+---
+extends: default
+
+rules:
+  line-length:
+    max: 120
+  indentation:
+    spaces: 2
+  quoted-strings:
+    quote-type: consistent
+    required: only-when-needed

     name: coverself-apis
     group: coverself
-    description: "Coverself API services (creol, hydrant, genesis, cortex, etc.)"
+    description: Coverself API services (creol, hydrant, genesis, cortex, etc.)
     chart: local-charts/coverself-apis
-    version: "0.1.0"
+    version: 0.1.0
     namespace: $CS_API_NAMESPACE
     enabled: true
     wait: true

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+set unstable
+uv_path := which("uv")
+default:
+    just --list
+
+init:
+    {{ if uv_path == '' { `curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh` } else { `uv self version > /dev/null` } }}
+    uv python install 3.14
+    uv tool install pre-commit --with pre-commit-uv
+    pre-commit install
+
+lint:
+    pre-commit run --all-files

@@ -2,16 +2,16 @@
 deployable_packages:
   nextgen.coverself.deploy:
     descriptors:
-      config: "deploy/luna-config-spec.yaml"
-      dependencies: "deploy/luna-dependencies.yaml"
+      config: deploy/luna-config-spec.yaml
+      dependencies: deploy/luna-dependencies.yaml
     hooks:
-      create: "deploy/create.sh"
-      destroy: "deploy/destroy.sh"
+      create: deploy/create.sh
+      destroy: deploy/destroy.sh
     files:
       include:
-      - "values"
-      - "*.yaml"
-      - "*.sh"
-      - "desired-state.yaml"
-      - "deploy/deploy-utils.sh"
-      - "local-charts"
+        - values
+        - '*.yaml'
+        - '*.sh'
+        - desired-state.yaml
+        - deploy/deploy-utils.sh
+        - local-charts
